title: phoebe neurantha var. neurantha
intro: Phoebe neurantha var. neurantha, also known as Chinese phoebe or Chinese tree pepper, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phoebe neurantha var. neurantha include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Phoebe neurantha var. neurantha is often used in tea, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be found in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
